sitting.name: Sitting
sitting.description: People sitting in the car seat, no obvious body movement.

reaching.name: Reaching
reaching.description: People reaching for objects in the car or in their pockets, or reaching their hats.

turning.name: Turning
turning.description: People turning their bodies or heads while seated, involving changes in body orientation.

bending.name: Bending
bending.description: People bending forward or backward, with obvious changes in body posture.

using_phone.name: Using Phone
using_phone.description: People using phone, holding the phone, looking at the screen, and interacting with the phone
